iran_nuke.notes: Day 16 19:04 — ELEVATED STABLE. No new nuclear signals. Iran FM Araghchi: 'Never asked for ceasefire, ready for long war.' Trump threatens Kharg Island 'just for fun.' 26 (stable).

iran_conventional.notes: Day 16 23:04 — IMMINENT 100 (capped, STABLE). Israel critically low on interceptors (Semafor). Iran warns Dubai+Doha areas to evacuate (Press TV). Baghdad Airport hit by rockets — 5 injured. IDF claims 80% Iran defense + 70% launchers destroyed. IRGC says stockpiles largely untouched. Trump: deal not imminent. 100 (capped, stable).

israel_lebanon.notes: Day 16 23:04 — IMMINENT 100 (capped, STABLE). 826-850 killed per AJ/health ministry. Fresh evacuation warnings Beirut suburbs. IDF claims 80% Iran defense degraded. Macron calls Pezeshkian. 100 (capped, stable).

turkey.notes: IMMINENT STABLE. Macron-Paris diplomatic push. Erdogan continues to resist being dragged into war. Patriot deployment ongoing. 72 + 6 (Iran coupling) = 78.

india.notes: ELEVATED STABLE. No new India-specific developments. 25 (stable).

russia.notes: IMMINENT STABLE. EU extends Russia sanctions 6 months. No new Russia-ME developments. 71 + 6 (Iran coupling) = 77.

china.notes: DETERRENT STABLE. US-China trade talks in Paris continue. No new developments. 11 (stable).

north_korea.notes: CRITICAL STABLE. 12x 600mm MRL test (3rd provocation this week). No new provocations in last 8h. 55 (stable).

russia_ukraine.notes: Day 16 23:04 — IMMINENT 91 (STABLE). Russia fires 68 missiles + 282 bombs + 9,222 drones in 24h. Ukraine strikes Crimea S-400 + Krasnodar oil station. 91 (stable).

pakistan_afghanistan.notes: Day 16 23:04 — IMMINENT 99 (capped, STABLE). Kandahar strikes aftermath. Taliban retaliates. No ceasefire signals. 99 (capped, stable).

top_signals: IRGC launches 50th wave of attacks on US bases in UAE, Bahrain, Kuwait (Al Jazeera/Reuters)
IDF hits 200+ targets in western/central Iran in 24h — expanded strike footprint (Times of Israel/AP)
US Energy Sec Wright: war will end 'in the next few weeks' — strongest US de-escalation signal yet (Guardian)
Iran FM Araghchi: Mojtaba Khamenei 'in good health, fully managing situation' (Guardian/AP)
Lebanon death toll 850+ including 100+ children (Lebanese health ministry/Guardian)
Ukraine strikes S-400 in Crimea + Tikhoretsk oil station — intensifying strike campaign (Kyiv Independent/ISW)
Pakistan Kandahar strikes kill 12 soldiers, 27 wounded. Taliban retaliates. No ceasefire (AP/India Today)
Kim Jong Un oversees 12x 600mm nuclear-capable MRL test — 3rd provocation this week (Reuters/KCNA)

new: israel_interceptor_low activated — Israel running critically low on ballistic missile interceptors (Semafor/AP)
dubai_doha_evac_warning activated — Iran warns residents in Dubai AND Doha to evacuate — expanded targeting (Press TV/Sky News)
baghdad_airport_rockets activated — Rockets hit Baghdad Airport, 5 injured. Iran-backed militia escalation in Iraq (AP/Sky News)
changed_signals.de_escalation_watch:
MIXED SIGNALS (Day 16 22:04):
- DE-ESCALATION: US Energy Sec Wright says war ends 'in next few weeks' — strongest US timeline for resolution. Sole major de-escalation signal.
- ESCALATION: IRGC 50th wave. IDF 200+ targets in 24h. Shiraz residential hit. Lebanon 850+ dead. No diplomacy on 7/8 fronts.
- Net: De-escalation signal (Wright) offset by continued military escalation. Energy market remains the pressure point driving US urgency.

latest_news.headline: Israel critically low on ballistic missile interceptors amid 3-week war
latest_news.text: Israel informed US it is running critically low on ballistic missile interceptors as conflict enters Day 17. IDF claims 80% of Iran defense systems destroyed but interceptor depletion could limit future effectiveness.

latest_news.headline: Iran warns residents in Dubai AND Doha to evacuate immediately
latest_news.text: Iran media operations centre warns residents in specific areas of Dubai and Doha that US military personnel are hiding there. Urges immediate evacuation. Most explicit targeting of civilian areas in Gulf states.

latest_news.headline: Rockets hit Baghdad Airport, 5 injured — Iran-backed militia escalation
latest_news.text: Multiple rockets hit Baghdad Airport and adjacent former US base. 4 airport security + 1 engineer injured. Iran-backed militias intensifying attacks on US-linked infrastructure in Iraq.

latest_news.headline: IRGC claims missile stockpiles largely untouched despite 16 days of strikes
latest_news.text: IRGC spokesperson says most missiles launched were produced a decade ago. Many post-12-day-war production not yet deployed. Challenges Trump: let ships enter Persian Gulf. Counter-narrative to IDF claims of 70% launchers destroyed.

latest_news.headline: Trump: Iran deal not imminent, terms not good enough yet
latest_news.text: Trump tells NBC Iran wants a deal but he is not ready because terms are not good enough. Questions if Mojtaba Khamenei is alive. Threatens Kharg Island hits just for fun.

latest_news.headline: Macron tells Iranian president to immediately end Gulf attacks
latest_news.text: French President Macron spoke with President Pezeshkian, demanding end to unacceptable attacks. Called for new political/security framework in Tehran. Says France intervened in purely defensive framework.

latest_news.headline: IDF claims 80% of Iran defensive systems destroyed, 70% of launchers eliminated
latest_news.text: IDF military briefing: struck 80% of Iran defensive systems, removed 70% of ballistic missile launchers from operational use. Degrading entire production chain. Calls operation prolonged but necessary.

latest_news.headline: Lebanon death toll 826+, fresh evacuation warnings for Beirut southern suburbs
latest_news.text: Israeli attacks kill entire family in Qantara including two children. Fresh evacuation warnings for Beirut suburbs. 826+ killed, 800,000+ displaced since Feb 28. WHO head in Lebanon.

outlook: CRITICAL — Global war probability 86% (Day 16 23:04). DAY 17 BEGINS: (1) IRAN -> IMMINENT 100 (capped, STABLE): Israel interceptors critically low. Iran warns Dubai+Doha evac. Baghdad Airport rockets. IDF claims 80% defense + 70% launchers destroyed. IRGC says stockpiles untouched. Trump: deal not imminent. (2) ISRAEL-LEBANON -> IMMINENT 100 (capped, STABLE): 826+ dead. Fresh Beirut evacuation warnings. (3) RUSSIA-UKRAINE -> IMMINENT 91 (STABLE): Massive aerial barrage. (4) PAKISTAN-AFGHANISTAN -> IMMINENT 99 (capped, STABLE): Kandahar aftermath. (5) RUSSIA -> IMMINENT 77. (6) TURKEY -> IMMINENT 78. (7) DPRK -> CRITICAL 55 (STABLE). (8) INDIA -> ELEVATED 25. KEY WATCH: Israel interceptor depletion is a force-multiplier — if Iran can sustain barrages while Israel runs dry, Israeli civilian casualties will spike. Macron diplomatic push is first major Western leader to directly demand new Tehran political framework. Dubai+Doha evacuation warnings signal Iran expanding civilian targeting to pressure Gulf states hosting US bases.
